title: Google Calendar integration - Invalid Date
excerpt: I have a problem with the Date column using Google Calendar integration. If it’s an all-day event, the column just shows “Invalid Date”. If the event is set at a specific time, the date and time shows as expected. Can an…

posts.author: kostafari (Kosta)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a problem with the Date column using Google Calendar integration. If it’s an all-day event, the column just shows “Invalid Date”. If the event is set at a specific time, the date and time shows as expected. Can anybody shed some light on this strange problem?
